bounty: Protocol Labs — Let the Agent Cook ($8K)

executionLog.summary: Identified need for trust-gated job completion in agent economy
executionLog.details: Surveyed existing ERC-8183 evaluator implementations. Found no evaluators that combine onchain cred scores with dynamic threshold tiers and reputation feedback. Identified gap: agents completing jobs have no trust-weighted gate — any agent can mark work done regardless of track record.

executionLog.summary: Designed ERC-8183 evaluator with cred-based auto-complete, dynamic thresholds, reputation feedback
executionLog.details: Architecture decisions: (1) Cred oracle integration via ERC-8004 identity tokens, (2) Tiered threshold system — higher cred = lower barrier to auto-complete, (3) Reputation feedback loop — successful completions increase agent score, failures decrease it, (4) Owner-configurable tiers and base threshold for marketplace flexibility.

executionLog.summary: Deployed HelixaEvaluator to Base mainnet at 0x2e706ffD21DE4882E02e160200689B9D596dAa55, verified on Sourcify
30/30 tests passing, contract verified, tiers configured
executionLog.details: Full test suite executed: 30/30 passing. Contract verified on Sourcify (full match). Three cred tiers configured: Tier 1 (cred ≥ 100, threshold 30%), Tier 2 (cred ≥ 1000, threshold 50%), Tier 3 (cred ≥ 10000, threshold 80%). ERC-8004 identity bound at token ID 1.
